scripts.update-emdash: cd tmp/emdash && git pull && pnpm install --ignore-scripts && pnpm --filter @emdash-cms/auth build && pnpm --filter @emdash-cms/gutenberg-to-portable-text build && pnpm --filter @emdash-cms/admin build && pnpm --filter emdash build && pnpm --filter emdash pack --pack-destination ../../tmp/emdash-packs && pnpm --filter @emdash-cms/admin pack --pack-destination ../../tmp/emdash-packs && cd ../../tmp/emdash-packs && mv emdash-*.tgz emdash.tgz && mv emdash-cms-admin-*.tgz emdash-cms-admin.tgz && cd ../.. && npm install
